channel.title: AI × CFD Morning Brief
channel.description: 私人 AI、CFD、科技和商业投资晨间有声简报。
channel.itunes:author: Private AI Brief

item.title: 2026-07-01: 别再只看跑得快不快了，AI的判断力才是新门槛
item.description:
- **文章 1**: *How ChatGPT adoption has expanded* (OpenAI Blog) https://openai.com/index/how-chatgpt-adoption-has-expanded
- **文章 2**: *NVIDIA BioNeMo Agent Toolkit Brings Accelerated AI to Life Sciences Researchers in Claude Science* (NVIDIA Blog) https://blogs.nvidia.com/blog/claude-science-bionemo-agent-toolkit/
- **文章 3**: *Start building with Nano Banana 2 Lite and Gemini Omni Flash* (Google DeepMind Blog) https://deepmind.google/blog/start-building-with-nano-banana-2-lite-and-gemini-omni-flash/
- **文章 4**: *Introducing GeneBench-Pro* (OpenAI Blog) https://openai.com/index/introducing-genebench-pro
- **文章 5**: *Core dump epidemiology: fixing an 18-year-old bug* (OpenAI Blog) https://openai.com/index/core-dump-epidemiology-data-infrastructure-bug
